meanings.definition: become different in some particular way, without permanently losing one's or its former characteristics or essence
examples: her mood changes in accordance with the weather
The supermarket's selection of vegetables varies according to the season

meanings.definition: be at variance with; be out of line with
be subject to change in accordance with a variable
examples: His moods vary depending on the weather

meanings.definition: make something more diverse and varied

examples: the varying angles of roof slope
